title: Aftermath
description: The sanctuary burns. But you're alive. Together.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: They have all run away, but they'll come back She'll return. She knows now.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: I couldn't have done it without you. Any of you.

closing.speaker: Father
closing.text: That's the truth of it. We're stronger together. Always.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Home feels different. Smaller. Something's changed within you.

choices.text: Ask father about mother. The loss that's always been there, unspoken.
Let the moment rest. Some conversations can wait for home.

puzzle.title: Sorting the Storm Within
puzzle.instructions: So much has happened. Sort through your memories and feelings.
